member.name: T:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController
member.summary: Controller for event attendance and RSVP operations. Includes register-based participant limit validation.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.GetEventAttendance(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets attendance list for an event.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.GetEventSummary(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets attendance summary for an event including register availability.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.RegisterAttendance(MusigElgg.DTOs.Attendance.AttendanceRequestDto)
member.summary: Registers attendance (RSVP) for the current user. Validates against register limits if defined.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.CancelAttendance(System.Guid)
member.summary: Cancels attendance for the current user.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.GetMyStatus(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets my attendance status for an event.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.GenerateToken(System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a QR code token for an event.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.CheckInQr(MusigElgg.DTOs.Attendance.CheckInQrRequestDto)
member.summary: Checks in a user via QR code token.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.GetStatistics(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets attendance statistics for a year.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.ExportStatistics(System.Int32)
member.summary: Exports attendance statistics as CSV.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AttendanceController.UpdateUserAttendance(System.Guid,System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.Attendance.AttendanceRequestDto)
member.summary: Updates attendance status for a specific user (Admin only).

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AuthController.Login(MusigElgg.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto)
member.summary: Logs in a user.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.AuthController.Register(MusigElgg.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequestDto)
member.summary: Registers a new user (Pending approval).

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController
member.summary: Controller for event management operations.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.GetAll(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets all events with optional filtering.
member.param: Include draft events (default: false, admin only).

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a specific event by ID.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.GetUpcoming(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets upcoming events.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.GetByDateRange(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Gets events within a date range.
member.returns: List of events within the range.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.GetBySeries(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets events by series.
member.returns: List of events in the series.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.GetWithParticipants(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets an event with its participants.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.Create(MusigElgg.DTOs.Events.CreateEventRequestDto)
member.summary: Creates a new event.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.CheckIn(System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.Events.CheckInRequestDto)
member.summary: Checks in a user to an event using a QR code.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.Update(System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.Events.UpdateEventRequestDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing event.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.Patch(System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.Events.UpdateEventRequestDto)
member.summary: Partially updates an event (e.g., publish draft, cancel).

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.EventsController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an event.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController
member.summary: Controller for music piece management (Noteninventar).

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.GetAll(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets all music pieces with optional filtering.
member.param: Search term for title, composer, or arranger.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a specific music piece by ID.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.GetGenres
member.summary: Gets all distinct genres for filtering.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.GetInstrumentationCodes
member.summary: Gets all distinct instrumentation codes for filtering.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.Create(MusigElgg.DTOs.MusicPieces.CreateMusicPieceRequestDto)
member.summary: Creates a new music piece.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.Update(System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.MusicPieces.UpdateMusicPieceRequestDto)
member.summary: Updates a music piece.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a music piece.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.UploadAttachment(System.Guid,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MusicAttachmentType,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uploads an attachment (PDF or Audio) for a music piece.
member.param: Attachment type: Pdf, Audio, Image, Other.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.DeleteAttachment(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an attachment.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.MusicPiecesController.ImportCsv(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,System.Char)
member.summary: Imports music pieces from a CSV file. Supports German and English column headers.
member.param: CSV file with semicolon or comma delimiter.
Column delimiter (default: semicolon for European CSV).

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Controllers.PublicWebsiteController
member.summary: Public API for the website (no authentication required).

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.PublicWebsiteController.GetNews
member.summary: Gets latest public news.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.PublicWebsiteController.GetPublicEvents
member.summary: Gets upcoming public events (minimal info).

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.PublicWebsiteController.GetHistory
member.summary: Gets association history/chronicle.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController
member.summary: Controller for task management ("Assign it!" module).

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.GetAll(System.Boolean,System.Nullable{MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AssignedTaskStatus})
member.summary: Gets all tasks with optional filtering.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.GetMyTasks
member.summary: Gets tasks assigned to the current user.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a specific task by ID.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.Create(MusigElgg.DTOs.Tasks.CreateAssignedTaskRequestDto)
member.summary: Creates a new task.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateAssignedTaskRequestDto)
member.summary: Updates a task's status.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.Update(System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateAssignedTaskRequestDto)
member.summary: Updates a task.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.AddComment(System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.Tasks.AddCommentRequestDto)
member.summary: Adds a comment to a task.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.GetComments(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets comments for a task.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.ToggleChecklistItem(System.Guid,System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.Tasks.ToggleChecklistItemDto)
member.summary: Toggles a checklist item.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.ArchiveOldTasks(System.Int32)
member.summary: Archives completed tasks older than specified days.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.TasksController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a task.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Controllers.UsersController
member.summary: Controller for user management operations.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.UsersController.GetAll
member.summary: Gets all users.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.UsersController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a specific user by ID.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.UsersController.GetByRole(MusigElgg.Data.Enums.UserRole)
member.summary: Gets users by role.
member.returns: List of users with the specified role.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.UsersController.Create(MusigElgg.DTOs.Users.CreateUserRequestDto)
member.summary: Creates a new user.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.UsersController.Update(System.Guid,MusigElgg.DTOs.Users.UpdateUserRequestDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing user.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Controllers.UsersController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a user.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask
member.summary: Represents a task in the "Assign it!" module. Tasks can be assigned to users or registers and optionally linked to events.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.Title
member.summary: Title of the task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.Description
member.summary: Detailed description of the task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.DueDate
member.summary: Due date for the task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.Status
member.summary: Current status of the task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.Priority
member.summary: Priority level (1 = lowest, 5 = highest).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.Recurrence
member.summary: Recurrence pattern for repeating tasks (e.g., monthly instrument maintenance).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.NextOccurrence
member.summary: If recurring, the next occurrence date.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the task was created.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the task was last updated.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.CompletedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the task was completed.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.ArchivedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the task was archived.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.CreatedById
member.summary: Foreign key to the user who created the task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.AssigneeId
member.summary: Foreign key to the assigned user (individual assignment).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.AssignedRegisterId
member.summary: Foreign key to the assigned register/group (group assignment, e.g., "Trompete").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.EventId
member.summary: Foreign key to the related event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.CreatedBy
member.summary: The user who created this task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.Assignee
member.summary: The user assigned to this task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.AssignedRegister
member.summary: The register/group assigned to this task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.Event
member.summary: The event this task is related to.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.ChecklistItems
member.summary: Checklist items for this task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssignedTask.Comments
member.summary: Comments/discussion on this task (Pinnwand).

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.AssociationHistory
member.summary: Represents a historical event or chronicle entry for the association.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event
member.summary: Represents an event organized by the music association.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.Title
member.summary: Title of the event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.Description
member.summary: Detailed description of the event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.StartTime
member.summary: Start date and time of the event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.EndTime
member.summary: End date and time of the event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.Location
member.summary: Location where the event takes place.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.MaxParticipants
member.summary: Maximum number of participants allowed. Null means unlimited.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.IsPublic
member.summary: Whether the event is publicly visible.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.IsCancelled
member.summary: Whether the event has been cancelled.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.IsDraft
member.summary: Whether the event is in draft mode (not yet published to members).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.AttendanceQrCode
member.summary: QR code for attendance tracking (stored as base64 or URL).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the event was created.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the event was last updated.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.CategoryId
member.summary: Foreign key to the event category.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.SeriesId
member.summary: Foreign key to the event series.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.Category
member.summary: The category of this event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.Series
member.summary: The series this event belongs to.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.Participants
member.summary: Participants of this event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.Tasks
member.summary: Tasks associated with this event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Event.RegisterLimits
member.summary: Register-specific participation limits for this event.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventCategory
member.summary: Represents a category for events with associated color for UI display. Uses the Musig Elgg color scheme: Burgundy (#801010) and Gold (#C5A059).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventCategory.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the category.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventCategory.Name
member.summary: Name of the category (e.g., "Konzert", "Probe", "Vereinsanlass").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventCategory.Description
member.summary: Description of the category.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventCategory.ColorHex
member.summary: Hex color code for the category (e.g., "#801010" for Burgundy, "#C5A059" for Gold).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventCategory.Events
member.summary: Events belonging to this category.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventParticipant
member.summary: Represents the many-to-many relationship between events and users (participants).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventParticipant.EventId
member.summary: Foreign key to the event.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventParticipant.UserId
member.summary: Foreign key to the user.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventParticipant.Status
member.summary: The attendance status of the participant.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventParticipant.RegisteredAt
member.summary: Date and time when the registration was made.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventParticipant.ConfirmedAt
member.summary: Date and time when attendance was confirmed (e.g., via QR code scan).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventParticipant.Notes
member.summary: Optional notes from the participant.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventParticipant.Event
member.summary: The event being participated in.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventParticipant.User
member.summary: The user participating.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventPost
member.summary: Represents a post on an event's board (Pinnwand).

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventSeries
member.summary: Represents a series of recurring events (e.g., weekly rehearsals).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventSeries.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the series.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventSeries.Name
member.summary: Name of the event series (e.g., "Wöchentliche Proben 2024").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventSeries.Description
member.summary: Description of the event series.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventSeries.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the series was created.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.EventSeries.Events
member.summary: Events that belong to this series.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment
member.summary: Represents an attachment (PDF, audio file) for a music piece.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the attachment.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.MusicPieceId
member.summary: Foreign key to the parent music piece.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.Type
member.summary: Type of attachment (PDF, Audio, Image, Other).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.FileName
member.summary: Original filename.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.FilePath
member.summary: Path to the stored file (relative to wwwroot).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.ContentType
member.summary: MIME type of the file.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.FileSize
member.summary: File size in bytes.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.Description
member.summary: Description of the attachment (e.g., "Partitur", "Stimmensatz", "Referenzaufnahme").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.InstrumentPart
member.summary: For audio files: which instrument/part is this recording (e.g., "Solo Trompete").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.SortOrder
member.summary: Sort order for display.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.UploadedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the attachment was uploaded.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicAttachment.MusicPiece
member.summary: The parent music piece.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece
member.summary: Represents a piece of music in the association's library (Noteninventar).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the music piece.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.CatalogNumber
member.summary: Inventory number/catalog number (e.g., "NR-001").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Title
member.summary: Title of the music piece.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Composer
member.summary: Composer of the music piece.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Arranger
member.summary: Arranger of the music piece.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Publisher
member.summary: Publisher of the music piece.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Genre
member.summary: Genre or style of the music (e.g., "Marsch", "Polka", "Walzer").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.StorageLocation
member.summary: Physical storage location (e.g., "Schrank A, Fach 3").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.StorageCabinet
member.summary: Storage cabinet/shelf (e.g., "A").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.StorageShelf
member.summary: Storage compartment/shelf (e.g., "3").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.InstrumentationCode
member.summary: Instrumentation/orchestration code (Besetzungscode). Examples: "BL" (Blasmusik), "BL-KL" (Kleine Blasmusik), "BB" (Brass Band)

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Instrumentation
member.summary: Detailed instrumentation description.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.DifficultyLevel
member.summary: Difficulty level (1-5 scale, where 1=beginner, 5=professional).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.DifficultyDescription
member.summary: Difficulty description text (e.g., "Mittelschwer", "Grade 3").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.DurationSeconds
member.summary: Duration in seconds.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Year
member.summary: Year the piece was published or acquired.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.CopiesCount
member.summary: Number of copies/sets available.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.IsAvailable
member.summary: Whether the piece is available for use or currently in use/lent.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.PdfPath
member.summary: Path to the PDF file of the sheet music (legacy, use Attachments).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.AudioPath
member.summary: Path to the audio file (legacy, use Attachments).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Notes
member.summary: Additional notes about the music piece.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the record was created.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the record was last updated.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.MusicPiece.Attachments
member.summary: Attachments (PDFs, audio files) for this music piece.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.NewsEntry
member.summary: Represents a news entry for the public website.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Register
member.summary: Represents an instrument register/section in the music association (e.g., Trompete, Klarinette, Schlagzeug).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Register.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the register.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Register.Name
member.summary: Name of the register (e.g., "Trompete", "Klarinette", "Schlagzeug").

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Register.Description
member.summary: Description or notes about this register.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Register.SortOrder
member.summary: Sort order for display purposes.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Register.Users
member.summary: Users belonging to this register.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Register.Limits
member.summary: Limits defined for this register on specific events.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.RegisterLimit
member.summary: Defines participation limits for a specific register at an event. For example: Max 3 trumpet players can attend a concert.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.RegisterLimit.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.RegisterLimit.EventId
member.summary: Foreign key to the event this limit applies to.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.RegisterLimit.RegisterId
member.summary: Foreign key to the register this limit applies to.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.RegisterLimit.MaxParticipants
member.summary: Maximum number of participants allowed from this register.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.RegisterLimit.MinParticipants
member.summary: Minimum number of participants needed from this register (optional).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.RegisterLimit.Event
member.summary: The event this limit applies to.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.RegisterLimit.Register
member.summary: The register this limit applies to.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey
member.summary: Represents a survey (Umfrage) with optional blind voting and multi-select.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.Title
member.summary: Title of the survey.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.Description
member.summary: Description of the survey.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.IsBlindVote
member.summary: Whether votes are hidden until EndDate (Blind Vote).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the survey is active.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.AllowMultipleOptions
member.summary: Whether users can select multiple options.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.EndDate
member.summary: End date for the survey (votes hidden until then for blind votes).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the survey was created.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.CreatedById
member.summary: FK to the user who created the survey.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.TargetGroupId
member.summary: FK to the target group (Register). Null = all users.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.Survey.EventId
member.summary: Optional link to an event.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.SurveyOption
member.summary: Represents an option in a survey.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.SurveyOption.Text
member.summary: Text of the option.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.SurveyOption.Description
member.summary: Optional description for the option.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.SurveyOption.SortOrder
member.summary: Sort order for display.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.SurveyVote
member.summary: Represents a vote cast by a user in a survey.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.SurveyVote.Comment
member.summary: Optional comment explaining the vote (qualitative feedback).

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskChecklistItem
member.summary: Represents a checklist item within a task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskChecklistItem.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the checklist item.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskChecklistItem.TaskId
member.summary: Foreign key to the parent task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskChecklistItem.Description
member.summary: Description of the checklist item.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskChecklistItem.IsChecked
member.summary: Whether the item is checked/completed.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskChecklistItem.SortOrder
member.summary: Sort order for display.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskChecklistItem.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the item was created.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskChecklistItem.CheckedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the item was checked.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskChecklistItem.Task
member.summary: The parent task.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment
member.summary: Represents a comment on a task (Pinnwand).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the comment.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment.TaskId
member.summary: Foreign key to the parent task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment.AuthorId
member.summary: Foreign key to the user who wrote the comment.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment.Content
member.summary: The comment text.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the comment was created.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment.EditedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the comment was last edited.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment.IsDeleted
member.summary: Whether the comment has been deleted (soft delete).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment.Task
member.summary: The parent task.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.TaskComment.Author
member.summary: The user who wrote the comment.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User
member.summary: Represents a user (member) of the music association.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the user.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.Email
member.summary: User's email address (unique).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.FirstName
member.summary: User's first name.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.LastName
member.summary: User's last name.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.Role
member.summary: The role of the user in the system.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the user account is active.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.PhoneNumber
member.summary: Phone number of the user.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.RegisterId
member.summary: Foreign key to the user's instrument register.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.PasswordHash
member.summary: Hashed password.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.Status
member.summary: Membership status (Active, Passive, etc.).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.Instrument
member.summary: User's main instrument (text field).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.EntryDate
member.summary: Date when the user joined the association.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the user was created.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the user was last updated.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.Register
member.summary: The user's instrument register (e.g., Trompete, Klarinette).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.EventParticipations
member.summary: Events the user is participating in.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.Data.Entities.User.AssignedTasks
member.summary: Tasks assigned to the user.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AssignedTaskStatus
member.summary: Defines the status of an assigned task in the "Assign it!" module.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AssignedTaskStatus.Open
member.summary: Task is open and waiting to be started.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AssignedTaskStatus.InProgress
member.summary: Task is currently being worked on.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AssignedTaskStatus.Completed
member.summary: Task has been completed successfully.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AssignedTaskStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Task has been cancelled.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AssignedTaskStatus.Archived
member.summary: Task has been archived (completed tasks after X days).

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AttendanceStatus
member.summary: Defines the attendance status for event participants.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AttendanceStatus.Pending
member.summary: Participation not yet confirmed.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AttendanceStatus.Confirmed
member.summary: Confirmed attendance.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AttendanceStatus.Declined
member.summary: Declined attendance.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AttendanceStatus.Tentative
member.summary: Maybe attending.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AttendanceStatus.Present
member.summary: User was present (Checked In).

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.AttendanceStatus.Unexcused
member.summary: User was absent without excuse.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MembershipStatus
member.summary: Defines the status of a member within the association.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MembershipStatus.Pending
member.summary: Pending approval (new registration).

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MembershipStatus.Active
member.summary: Active member participating in rehearsals/concerts.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MembershipStatus.Passive
member.summary: Passive member (financially supporting or on break).

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MembershipStatus.Honorary
member.summary: Honorary member (Ehrenmitglied).

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MusicAttachmentType
member.summary: Type of music attachment.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MusicAttachmentType.Pdf
member.summary: PDF sheet music (Notenblatt).

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MusicAttachmentType.Audio
member.summary: Audio reference recording (Referenzaufnahme).

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MusicAttachmentType.Image
member.summary: Image (e.g., cover, handwritten notes).

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.MusicAttachmentType.Other
member.summary: Other file type.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.TaskRecurrence
member.summary: Defines the recurrence pattern for recurring tasks.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.TaskRecurrence.None
member.summary: No recurrence, one-time task.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.TaskRecurrence.Daily
member.summary: Task repeats daily.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.TaskRecurrence.Weekly
member.summary: Task repeats weekly.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.TaskRecurrence.Monthly
member.summary: Task repeats monthly.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.TaskRecurrence.Yearly
member.summary: Task repeats yearly.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.UserRole
member.summary: Defines the roles a user can have in the system.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.UserRole.Member
member.summary: Regular member of the music association.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.UserRole.Admin
member.summary: Administrator with full access to all features.

member.name: F:MusigElgg.Data.Enums.UserRole.Public
member.summary: Public user (limited access, e.g. guest or pending).

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Data.MusigElggDbContext
member.summary: Database context for the Musig Elgg application.

member.summary: Response DTO for attendance status.

member.summary: When the token expires.

member.summary: The scanned token.

member.summary: DTO for attendance statistics.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.DTOs.Attendance.AttendanceStatisticsDto.TotalEvents
member.summary: Total events user was expected to attend.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.DTOs.Attendance.AttendanceStatisticsDto.PresentCount
member.summary: Count of confirmed attendances (Present + Confirmed).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.DTOs.Attendance.AttendanceStatisticsDto.ExcusedCount
member.summary: Count of excused absences (Declined).

member.name: P:MusigElgg.DTOs.Attendance.AttendanceStatisticsDto.UnexcusedCount
member.summary: Count of unexcused absences.

member.name: P:MusigElgg.DTOs.Attendance.AttendanceStatisticsDto.ParticipationRate
member.summary: Participation percentage (Present / Total).

member.summary: Response DTO for register availability check.

member.summary: Response DTO for event attendance summary.

member.summary: Percentage (hidden if blind vote and not ended).

member.summary: Repository interface for AssignedTask entities with additional methods.

member.summary: Gets tasks assigned to a specific user.

member.summary: Gets tasks by status.

member.summary: Gets tasks related to a specific event.

member.summary: Gets overdue tasks.

member.summary: Gets pending tasks (open or in progress).

member.summary: Repository interface for Event entities with additional methods.

member.summary: Gets events within a date range.

member.summary: Gets events by category.

member.summary: Gets events by series.

member.summary: Adds a series and its events transactionally.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Repositories.IEventRepository.CheckInParticipantAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Checks in a participant. Returns true if successful, false if user not registered (optional: could auto-register).

member.summary: Gets music pieces by storage location.

member.summary: Generic repository interface for CRUD operations.

member.summary: Gets all entities.

member.summary: Finds entities matching the specified predicate.

member.summary: Gets the count of entities matching the predicate.

member.summary: Service for calculating attendance statistics and generating reports.

member.summary: Generates a CSV file byte array for the statistics.

member.summary: Validates CSV headers against expected columns.

member.name: T:MusigElgg.Services.QrCodeService
member.summary: Service for generating and validating secure QR code tokens.

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Services.QrCodeService.GenerateToken(System.Guid,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Generates a time-limited token for an event. Token format: Base64(Encrypted(EventId|ExpiryTicks))

member.name: M:MusigElgg.Services.QrCodeService.ValidateToken(System.String)
member.summary: Validates a token and returns the EventId if valid.
